packages.name: genswarms-telegram
packages.description: Reusable Telegram transport and GenSwarms object handlers
packages.note: deps: the Dashboard module implements genswarms-dashboard's extension contract (schema 1) — data-shaped, no compile dep; the registry dep declares the pairing (design §9).

packages.name: telegram-editor
packages.description: Faithful rich-message preview renderer and editor shell for genswarms-telegram cards (dev tooling; zero runtime deps)
packages.note: Version-locked with genswarms-telegram by construction: one repo, one tag, shared tags.json contract tested from both sides in one CI run.
